REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-29-2018 - ***CASE IS DISMISSED.*** APPEARANCE AT TRIAL CALL BY DEFENDANT STEPHEN WHITE, SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. (THE COURT RECEIVED A TELEPHONE CALL PRIOR TO THE START OF SESSION FROM ARASH MOUSSAVIAN, ESQ. SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. COUNSEL INDICATED THAT HE WOULD BE APPEARING FIRST IN DEPT. 501 FOR THEIR 9:00AM TRIAL CALL CALENDAR.) THE COURT (DEPT. 206) CALLED THIS MATTER FOR THE FIRST TIME AT 10:00AM. THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE BY COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF. THE COURT PASSED THE MATTER TO THE END OF THE CALENDAR. THE COURT RE-CALLED THIS REMAINING MATTER AT 10:10AM. THERE STILL BEING NO APPEARANCE BY COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF, THE COURT DISMISSED THE CASE FOR NON-APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/TLJ)
